zh.lifeSummary: 當William Whitby於1582年出生在英國坎布利其爾牛頓時，他的父親William Whitby16歲，母親Martha Ransome22歲。他和Flower Pearson至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1677年在美國維吉尼亞州享年95歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾哈爾斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Whitby于1582年出生在英国坎布利其爾牛頓时，他的父亲William Whitby16岁，母亲Martha Ransome22岁。他和Flower Pearson至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1677年在美国弗吉尼亚州享年95岁，埋葬在英国英格兰坎布利其爾哈爾斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Whitby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Whitby, a port in North Yorkshire, or from Whitby in Cheshire. The North Yorkshire placename probably derives from the Old Norse personal name Hvíti or Old Norse hvítr ‘white’ + bý ‘farmstead, village’. The Cheshire placename derives from Old English hwīt ‘white’ + burg ‘fortress’, later replaced by Old Norse bý.

variants.name: Whidby
meanings: English (Durham and East Anglia): variant of English   Whitby  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Whitby was born in 1582, in Newton, Cambridgeshire, England, his father, William Whitby, was 16 and his mother, Martha Ransome, was 22. He had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Flower Pearson. He died in 1677, in Virginia, United States, at the age of 95, and was buried in Harston, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Whitby est né en 1582, à Newton, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, son père, William Whitby, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Martha Ransome, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Flower Pearson. Il est décédé en 1677, à Virginie, États-Unis, à l’âge de 95 ans, et a été enterré à Harston, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Whitby 1582 in Newton, Cambridgeshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Whitby 16 und seine Mutter Martha Ransome 22. Er hatte mit Flower Pearson mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1677 im Alter von 95 Jahren in Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Harston, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Whitby è nato il nel 1582 nel Newton, Cambridgeshire, England, il suo padre, William Whitby, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Martha Ransome, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Flower Pearson. Morì nel 1677, nel Virginia, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 95 anni, e fu sepolto a Harston, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: William Whitbyが1582年にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアニュートンで生まれた時，父William Whitbyは16歳，母Martha Ransomeは22歳であった。彼はFlower Pearsonとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1677年にアメリカ合衆国バージニア州で95歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアハーストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: William Whitby(이)가 1582년 영국 캄브리지실르 뉴턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Whitby(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Martha Ransome(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Flower Pearson(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1677년 미국 버지니아 주에서 95세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 하르스턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Whitby nasceu em 1582, em Newton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Whitby, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Martha Ransome, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Flower Pearson. Ele faleceu em 1677, em Virgínia, Estados Unidos da América, com 95 anos, e foi sepultado em Harston, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Whitby родился в 1582 г. в местности нютон, камбриджешир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Whitby было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Martha Ransome, 22. У него было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Flower Pearson. Он умер в 1677 г. в местности Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 95 лет и был похоронен в местности харстон, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Whitby nació en 1582, en Newton, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Whitby, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Martha Ransome, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Flower Pearson. Murió en 1677, en Virginia, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 95 años, y fue sepultado en Harston, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
